title: Residential Listing
description: Schema for residential real estate listings including homes, condos, and townhouses for sale.

address.description: Street address of the property. Commonly found in: listing page header, property details section, MLS data block.

city.description: City where the property is located. Commonly found in: listing address line, property details, breadcrumb navigation.

state.description: State or province where the property is located. Commonly found in: listing address line, property details, breadcrumb navigation.

zip_code.description: ZIP or postal code of the property. Commonly found in: listing address line, property details.

country.description: Country where the property is located. Commonly found in: listing address line, property details.

latitude.description: Geographic latitude coordinate of the property. Commonly found in: map embed data, JSON-LD structured data, page metadata.

longitude.description: Geographic longitude coordinate of the property. Commonly found in: map embed data, JSON-LD structured data, page metadata.

price.description: Listing price of the property in the listed currency. Commonly found in: listing header price display, property summary box, price history section.

price_currency.description: ISO 4217 currency code for the listing price (e.g. USD). Commonly found in: price display, property details.

price_per_sqft.description: Price per square foot of the property. Commonly found in: property details table, listing stats section.

status.description: Current listing status of the property. Commonly found in: listing status badge, property header, MLS status field.

bedrooms.description: Number of bedrooms. Commonly found in: property specs bar, listing summary, property details table.

bathrooms_full.description: Number of full bathrooms. Commonly found in: property specs bar, listing summary, property details table.

bathrooms_half.description: Number of half bathrooms. Commonly found in: property details table, listing summary.

sqft.description: Total interior square footage of the property. Commonly found in: property specs bar, listing summary, property details table.

lot_size_sqft.description: Lot size in square feet. Commonly found in: property details table, listing stats section.

year_built.description: Year the property was built. Commonly found in: property details table, listing overview section.

property_type.description: Type of residential property. Commonly found in: listing header, property details, breadcrumb navigation.

stories.description: Number of stories or floors in the property. Commonly found in: property details table, listing features section.

garage_spaces.description: Number of garage parking spaces. Commonly found in: property details table, listing features section.

hoa_fee_monthly.description: Monthly HOA (Homeowners Association) fee amount. Commonly found in: property details table, listing financial section, HOA info block.

days_on_market.description: Number of days the property has been listed on the market. Commonly found in: listing stats section, property details table, MLS data.

listing_date.description: Date the property was listed. Commonly found in: listing stats section, property history, MLS data.

description.description: Full text description of the property. Commonly found in: listing description section, property overview text block.

features.description: List of property features and amenities. Commonly found in: property features section, listing amenities list, interior/exterior features.

images.description: URLs of property images. Commonly found in: photo gallery, listing image carousel, media section.

agent_name.description: Name of the listing agent. Commonly found in: agent contact card, listing agent section, sidebar.

agent_phone.description: Phone number of the listing agent. Commonly found in: agent contact card, listing agent section.

brokerage.description: Name of the brokerage firm representing the listing. Commonly found in: agent contact card, listing attribution, footer.

mls_id.description: MLS (Multiple Listing Service) identifier for this listing. Commonly found in: listing details table, MLS data block, footer attribution.

open_house_dates.description: Scheduled open house dates and times. Commonly found in: open house section, listing sidebar, event calendar.

tax_assessed_value.description: Tax assessed value of the property. Commonly found in: property tax section, listing financial details, public records.

annual_tax.description: Annual property tax amount. Commonly found in: property tax section, listing financial details, public records.

page_title.description: Title of the source page. Tabstack auto-fills this from page metadata when left empty.

favicon.description: Favicon URL of the source page. Tabstack auto-fills this from page metadata when left empty.
